text.title: vui-conversation-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vui-conversation-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLMs over-confirm. Every "Just to confirm…" turn is a tax; force the agent to justify each one.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Confirmation turns delay goal completion and increase abandonment. Only confirm high-consequence actions.

failure-mode.description: Generated paraphrase corpora cluster around the LLM's own register, missing dialect and code-switching.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM paraphrases are over-formal and lack regional variation. Augment with real voice logs or crowdsourced examples.

failure-mode.description: LLMs generate the wake word or branded voice persona unsupervised.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: TTS pronunciation lands wrong on syllable stress and prosody. Human voice talent and TTS tuning are non-negotiable.

failure-mode.description: Dialog state is implicit ("in the prompt"). Long-context models fake competence and then drop entities at turn 5.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Only explicit slot-filling frames are reliable. Never use context-window depth as a substitute for state management.

failure-mode.description: Privacy ignored: raw user audio piped into a cloud LLM without redaction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Regulatory exposure (GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA). Strip names, account numbers, and PHI before logging.

failure-mode.description: Streaming ASR partial results trigger premature LLM responses.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Partial results cause early action and jarring UX. Gate on `is_final` flag and pin a stability threshold (e.g., 500ms silence).
